message:
test(websocket): add audit regression tests for close validation, masking, and codec error recovery

Adds comprehensive regression tests for the recently added RFC 6455
compliance checks:

Close frame payload validation:
- 1-byte close payload correctly rejected (InvalidClosePayload)
- Empty close payload accepted (valid per §5.5.1)
- 2-byte close payload accepted (status code only)

Reserved close code assertions:
- Codes 1005, 1006, 1015 each trigger panic with clear message
- Commonly used codes (1000-1011, 4000) accepted without panic

Additional coverage:
- PayloadTooLarge rejection in the 7-bit length path (DoS protection)
- apply_mask involution: empty payload is no-op, all 4 mask key bytes
  exercised on 5-byte payload, double-apply restores original
- Codec state machine recovery: after a decode error (RSV1 set), the
  codec correctly resets to Header state and decodes subsequent valid
  frames

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
